paper_title: Fractal Magnetism and Hydrogen-Holographic Systems: The EGS Nodal Lattice Resonator Framework

hypothesis.H0: Residuals explained by known physics and measurement uncertainty
hypothesis.H1: Residuals contain geometric organization at Phi^n intervals

falsification_criteria: No statistically significant structured behavior in large-scale residuals
Tunneling corrections unsupported by controlled measurements
Standard theory fully explains observations within error bounds
